doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The document claims to authorize paralegals to draft and file legal motions without pre-filing attorney review and to waive unauthorized practice liability, which contradicts California Bar rules that cannot be suspended by internal protoco
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document claims to waive unauthorized practice of law (§5) without requiring pre-filing attorney review or post-filing countersignature validation, which contradicts established California bar ethics rules that cannot be suspended by internal protocol; no such 2025 protocol appears in State Bar official records, and the specific claims about paralegal-only motion drafting without attorney oversight violate Business & Professions Code §6125 requirements.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document claims to authorize paralegals to draft and file legal motions without pre-filing attorney review and to waive unauthorized practice liability, which contradicts California Bar rules that cannot be suspended by internal protocol.
